# SaaS Starter Pack

**Business model:** Software-as-a-Service — recurring revenue generated by selling software access through a subscription model. Product experience is the primary trust-builder; trial and freemium mechanics lower acquisition friction and accelerate the purchase decision.
**Primary marketing challenges:**
- Trial activation: getting free users to reach the "aha moment" within 24–72 hours before they churn silently
- Trial-to-paid conversion: overcoming the inertia of the free tier and the fear of commitment
- Integration trust: buyers evaluate SaaS based on how well it fits their existing stack — integration proof is a conversion lever

**Disciplines covered:** Paid_Media · Content_SEO · Lifecycle_Email · Social · Landing_Pages

## When to use this pack
Use for SaaS companies with self-serve or product-led growth models — particularly mid-market tools where the product trial is the primary sales channel. Signals: MRR/ARR revenue model, free trial or freemium offering, product usage data available, G2/Capterra category presence. For enterprise SaaS with a full sales cycle, supplement with the B2B pack.

## Pack contents
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| Paid_Media/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for Google Search (intent-based), LinkedIn (enterprise tier), and trial-CTA campaigns |
| Content_SEO/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for comparison pages, use-case pages, and integration SEO |
| Lifecycle_Email/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for trial activation, onboarding milestones, and expansion sequences |
| Social/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for product demos, customer wins, and feature launch content |
| Landing_Pages/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for free trial pages, pricing pages, and integration landing pages |
